title: Thinking budget
summary: Tune the model's reasoning depth. Gemini 3.x uses thinking_level (minimal/low/medium/high); Gemini 2.5 uses an integer thinking_budget. thoughts_token_count is the cost.
notes: Gemini 3.x: thinking_level ∈ {minimal, low, medium, high}; default is high. Set 'minimal' on Flash for the lowest latency, but it does not guarantee disabling.
Gemini 2.5: thinking_budget is an integer token cap. -1 enables dynamic thinking; 0 disables on Flash.
Thinking tokens are billed at the output rate. Pair this sample with text.basic on the same prompt to see the cost-vs-quality tradeoff.
